# F057 Row-Wise Abstention Synthesis

## Decision
`F057_ROWWISE_ABSTENTION_READY_FOR_TIER2_DESIGN`

## Purpose
F055 and F056 both found safe nonzero row-wise residual abstention. F057 aggregates those six fresh seeds and decides whether the mechanism is ready for a formal, still non-promoting Tier 2 design.

## Six-Seed Metrics
- seed count: `6`
- selected transition mean: `0.374872`
- floor transition mean: `0.373962`
- transition gap mean: `0.000910` (min `0.000172`)
- selected delta cosine mean: `0.867681`
- floor delta cosine mean: `0.866021`
- delta cosine gap mean: `0.001660` (min `0.000396`)
- selected recall@1 mean: `0.864198`
- floor recall@1 mean: `0.864198`
- recall gap mean: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- row-wise active fraction mean: `0.302469`
- row-wise effective scale mean: `0.015123`
- total held-out broken rows: `0`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`

## Next Recommendation
Design a promotion-ineligible Tier 2 amendment for row-wise abstention with more seeds, stricter artifact contracts, and eventually an external/Norman diagnostic only after synthetic gates remain clean.

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F057 only justifies a future Tier 2/Tier 3 amendment if the user or autonomy loop continues.
